title: PixelCringe - Pixelmon debloater
description: Removes all the annoying things from Pixelmon
body:
# PixelCringe
Pixelmon has **A LOT** of things that annoy me so I made this mod

## Current patches
### Screens
* Disabled escape menu screen modifications
* Disabled world load screen modifications
* Disabled server connection screen modifications
* Disabled main menu screen modifications
* Disabled multiplayer screen modifications
### Discord
* Force disabled Discord RPC
### Misc
* Disabled game icon replacement
* Disabled pixelmon servers promotion (does not remove servers if you already have them)

## Config
Use [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) or [Forge Config Screens](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-screens) to access config menu in game

## Supported versions
* 1.16.5: done
* 1.20.1: done
* 1.20.2: done
* 1.21.1: done
* <=1.12.2: not planned
